phases.name: Nominate-AI Project Ecosystem Development Phase
phases.description: This development phase represents a flurry of activity in April 2025, with multiple projects being initiated and the foundation laid for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. The early projects focused on data processing, messaging platforms, lead finding tools, and web scraping capabilities. As the month progressed, more tools were developed to facilitate header mapping.

phases.name: Production Ready Systems
phases.description: The Nominate-AI project ecosystem reached production-ready systems with significant development and testing, achieving high success rates. This phase focused on refining existing infrastructure and building new systems to support the project's goals.

milestones.title: Initial commit of maild repository with pipeline scripts and service setup
Release of maild-ui and maild-exec repositories with documentation updates
Initial commit of pocket repository with HTML development
Release of lochness repository with significant HTML development
Initial commit of cryptid repository with complete conversion documentation and batch processing tools
Release of mog repository with production-ready Python system

phases.name: Prototyping Phase
phases.description: The Prototyping Phase saw the creation of individual components and modules, primarily in Python and TypeScript. These early prototypes focused on building a foundational structure for the Nominate-AI ecosystem, laying the groundwork for future development.

milestones.title: Add comprehensive testing infrastructure and documentation

phases.name: Refactoring and Implementation
phases.description: The development phase focused on refactoring and implementing core components of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. The cbapp repository underwent significant updates, while the other repositories were created from scratch to support AI and ML functionality.

phases.name: Alpha Development
phases.description: Establishing a foundation for future AI-driven applications through creation of core components.

phases.name: Proof-of-Concept/MVP
phases.description: A set of initial projects showcasing core components and APIs for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem, including authentication, SMS gateway, and testing frameworks.

milestones.title: cbtest repository created for bootstrap API testing
cbsms repository created for SMS gateway API

phases.name: Development Phase: Early Project Foundation
phases.description: The early project foundation involved building core infrastructure and APIs for various components, including unstructured document processing, wireless tunneling, and headless email clients. This phase laid the groundwork for more advanced features to be added later. The development focus was on creating a robust set of libraries and tools that would serve as the basis for further innovation.

phases.name: Campaign Brain Service Foundation
phases.description: This development phase represented the creation of a foundation for various services and tools supporting the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. A unified CLI, core library, and self-hosted CDN assets were developed to provide a solid base for the campaign brain service. This marked a significant milestone in the project's development.

milestones.title: Campaign Brain Geocoding Service and Unified CLI
Core library for Campaign Brain FastAPI services
FastAPI URL shortener service and agent memory and knowledge management service

phases.name: Initial Development Phase
phases.description: The Initial Development Phase saw the creation of core components and systems for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. The repos developed during this phase laid the foundation for future development, including campaign management tools, issue tracking, and API access layers.

milestones.title: ['VPN Cluster Management API (cbvpn) and online payment system (cbpayments) created']
API access layer for social media accounts (cbsocial) created

phases.name: Development Phase: Alpha Release
phases.description: The Nominate-AI project ecosystem saw its initial development with the creation of seven repositories, showcasing the integration of various AI and ML tools. The repositories provided a platform for managing different aspects of the project, including campaign management, network clusters, executive summaries, and business intelligence dashboards.

milestones.title: MCP server — Campaign Brain service catalog for LLM agents
The cbnetwork repository is a Python-based CLI toolkit for managing OpenWRT VPN/Tor network clusters.
Internal tool for managing political radio advertising rates across 1,900+ radio stations with advanced filtering, QA workflows, and rate management capabilities.
CBPulse UI — VIP business intelligence and system monitoring dashboard
Campaign Brain Front App email integration service
The vip-frontend repository is a TypeScript application built with Manus, providing real-time financial dashboards, actionable alerts, and role-based access.

phases.name: Campaign Brain UI Development
phases.description: The development of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem's Campaign Brain UI, including CBRadio UI and other tools for managing media buying platforms, website creation, scheduling tasks, and AI-powered generative interfaces.

phases.name: Campaign Brain Project Ecosystem Development Phase
phases.description: This development phase focused on building the infrastructure and services for Campaign Brain, including data center management, AI/ML components, and user guides. Key milestones included the creation of submodules for infrastructure services and initial development of the CBQA CLI. The phase culminated in the launch of the campaign brain project ecosystem.

milestones.title: cbtts (Campaign Brain TTS service wrapping VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B) created
cbdc (Campaign Brain data center infrastructure) created
User guides and ops handbooks for Campaign Brain services (cbhandbook) created

phases.name: Campaign Brain Infrastructure Development
phases.description: The Campaign Brain Infrastructure Development phase focused on building foundational tools and infrastructure for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. These early milestones included the development of AI-powered task management, infrastructure standards updates, and operations dashboards.

repos.name: cbapp
repos.description: The cbapp repository appears to be a Python-based project that has undergone significant updates and refactoring, including domain migrations, API additions, and feature enhancements. Recent commits have focused on improving the user interface, adding new features such as Typeform integration, and fixing bugs. The repository is now in a state of active development.

repos.description: Internal tool for managing political radio advertising rates across 1,900+ radio stations with advanced filtering, QA workflows, and rate management capabilities · Built with Manus

repos.name: cbfiles
repos.description: The cbfiles repository appears to be a Python project that provides various features for image and video processing, including vision inference, search, and media asset management. Recent commits have focused on improving performance, adding new features such as HEIC support, and enhancing compatibility with different platforms. The repository has also undergone domain migrations and refactorings.

repos.name: cbproject
repos.description: cbproject repository with ongoing development and maintenance

repos.name: cbos
repos.description: The cbos repository appears to be a Python project that has undergone significant development and maintenance over several months, with recent commits focusing on improving code quality, adding new features, and updating dependencies. The repository has seen multiple major releases (v0.3.1, v0.4.0, v0.5.0) and several minor updates, indicating a steady pace of development and refinement. Overall, the project seems to be centered around building a mesh-based system with various features and tools.
